name: Holiday Double Chocolate Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 10 oz. package of Holiday Baking Bits (Candy Coated)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a bowl, stir together flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter until creamy. Add brown sugar and granulated sugar; mix well.
4. Add vanilla extract and eggs, beating until well combined.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just blended.
6. Stir in 1 cup of Holiday Baking Bits.
7. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto a lightly greased cookie sheet.
8. Press the remaining bits into the cookies before baking.
9. Bake for 7-9 minutes or until the edges are set but centers still appear slightly soft.
10. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks for about 3-1/2 dozen cookies.
